nodes.label: ADR 0001: Convert xP Signals to FPL Point Units
nodes.norm_label: adr 0001: convert xp signals to fpl point units

nodes.label: ADR 0002: Treat FPL ep_this as Benchmark
nodes.norm_label: adr 0002: treat fpl ep_this as benchmark

nodes.label: xP Signal Point Conversion Rationale
nodes.rationale: Point conversion chosen over 0-1 normalisation so xP output is in interpretable FPL point units directly comparable to actual scores on the History page. Normalisation produces dimensionless rank, not a point estimate, breaking History page MAE and benchmark comparison.

nodes.label: ep_this as Benchmark Rationale
nodes.rationale: ep_this used as benchmark only (not formula input) to avoid double-counting fixture difficulty already baked into FPL's estimate. Keeps our model fully explainable; History page comparison reveals divergence without hiding it in a blend.
